flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Massachusetts Bay Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Massachusetts Bay Community College rose 66% between 2006 and 2009 (16.5% → 27.4%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Massachusetts Bay Community College are 40% above 6-year earnings ($37.5k → $52.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Massachusetts Bay Community College rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8k → 3.8k).
